DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF JONATHAN VANYA-HAND'S MOTION TO QUASH OR MODIFY SUBPOENA TO CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER, RADIOLOGY - THE MOTION TO QUASH OR MODIFY SUBPOENA IS GRANTED, IN PART. PLAINTIFF'S MEDICAL RECORDS ARE DIRECTLY RELEVANT TO THE DAMAGES CLAIMED BY PLAINTIFF IN THE LAWSUIT. HOWEVER, THE SCOPE OF THE MEDICAL RECORDS TO BE PRODUCED SHALL BE LIMITED TO THOSE WHICH RELATE OR PERTAIN TO FOLLOWING CONDITIONS: HEAD INJURY OR LACERATION, HEAD OR BRAIN TRAUMA, NEUROLOGICAL INJURY, PAIN, SUFFERING, INCONVENIENCE, LOSS OF INCOME, LOSS OF EARNING CAPACITY, PAST AND FUTURE MEDICAL EXPENSES. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. DEFENDANT SHALL SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER AND TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE PRO TEM: AARON MINNIS, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

Plaintiff's medical records are directly relevant to the damages claimed by plaintiff in the lawsuit. However, the scope of the medical records to be produced shall be limited to those which relate or pertain to following conditions: head injury or laceration, head or brain trauma, neurological injury, pain, suffering, inconvenience, loss of income, loss of earning capacity, past and future medical expenses. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied. Defendant shall prepare form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro tem: Aaron Minnis, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not Reported. =302/jpt
